title: The First Meeting
description: We first met on the sets of a shampoo commercial in 2013. We instantly connected and became good friends, which soon blossomed into something much more beautiful.

title: Making it Public
description: After keeping it under wraps for a while, Virat blew a flying kiss to Anushka in the stands during a match, making our relationship official to the world.

title: Standing by Each Other
description: Through the highs of centuries and the lows of tough tours, we have been each other's biggest pillars of strength.

title: The Proposal
description: A quiet, romantic proposal that was just between the two of us, sealing our promise to be together forever.

title: The Big Day
description: Surrounded by our closest friends and family in the beautiful countryside of Tuscany, we tied the knot in a magical ceremony.
